name: Backup Catalog Deleted
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection)
SIGMA Title: Backup Catalog Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects backup catalog deletions

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=524 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft-windows-backup%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Backup Catalog Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=524 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft-windows-backup%' AQL filter query
